## 🎨 FORMATTING NOTES

- **Headline font**: Bold, Uppercase when emphasizing
- **Body copy**: 14-18px, readable sans-serif
- **CTAs**: Always with arrow (→)
- **Numbers**: Always specific (not "many", "lots", "huge")
- **Claims**: Always backed by Prof. Shemer or clinical data
